title: Wire the full test suite into CI + npm test (REQ-H2)
description: Extend .github/workflows/test.yml AND the npm `test` script to run ALL tests/*.test.mjs plus ALL agents/__tests__/*.test.mjs, plus `node agents/four-layer-validate.mjs` and `node agents/test-behavior.mjs --framework`. Today CI runs only adapter-and-model-manager + test-behavior (~1 of 23 test files). Spec: openspec/changes/competitive-roadmap/specs/internal-hardening.md REQ-H2. Keep zero npm deps.
